ddls:
CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the product_categories table */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repair_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repair policy */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the product_types table */,
  "max_repair_time" TEXT /* Maximum time allowed for repair from the date the product is received in the repair center */,
  "max_repair_count" INTEGER /* Maximum number of repairs allowed before replacement or refund */,
  "action_if_repair_not_possible" TEXT /* Action to be taken if repair is not possible or if the maximum number of repairs has been reached */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the policy is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the product_types table */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the product */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customers table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the product is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the customer is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repairs" (
  "repair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repair */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the products table */,
  "repair_date" TEXT /* Date of repair */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repair */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the repair (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the repair was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the repair was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the repair is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replacement_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the product_types table */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of replacement units available */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the inventory is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_service_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customers table */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the products table */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of interaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the interaction is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id")
)
